## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check src/`)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] Type hints on all new functions
- [ ] Docstrings on public functions
- [ ] Acceptance criteria from issue are met
- [ ] No non-ASCII characters (`grep -rPn '[^\x00-\x7F]' --include="*.py" --include="*.md" . | grep -v '.git/'`)

prs.title: navbar and footer sticky issue fixed in about page

issues.title: Sidebar and player overlap in responsive view
issues.body: When resizing the browser window or viewing on smaller screens, the sidebar (containing Home, Search, and Library sections) overlaps with the bottom music player and sometimes the main content area. This causes layout issues and makes the interface hard to use on mobile or tablet screens.

issues.title: “The Blank Page” overlaps with the Menu button when i do responsive
issues.body: When the page is opened, the title “The Blank Page” overlaps with the Menu button at the top-left corner. This causes a visual alignment issue and makes the UI look cluttered when i do responsive.

issues.title: Logo image not responsive — overlaps text on smaller screens
issues.body: When viewing the website on smaller screens or mobile devices, the logo image in the header section becomes too large and overlaps the heading text (“Support OpenGovAfrica”). This affects readability and breaks the visual layout of the page. On larger screens, the layout appears correct.

issues.title: Footer alignment, size, and sticky behavior issue
issues.body: The footer on the ForkTheCaptcha website is not properly aligned and appears too large in height. It also seems to behave like a sticky footer, overlapping or not positioning correctly at the bottom of the page.

issues.title: Add a missing footer section in the website
issues.body: The footer section on the website is not properly aligned. It appears detached from the bottom of the page, and the “Quick Links” and “Connect With Us” sections look uneven or misplaced.

issues.title: The title of the website is not at align at center and imporvement in UI
issues.body: The UI need to change and   heading is not at center .

issues.title: Issue: UI/UX and CSS Enhancements for Menu Page
issues.body:
1. **Uneven button shadows and borders** - Have inconsistent shadow direction and intensity, creating a mismatched 3D effect.
2. **Overlapping glow effects** - The blue shadow behind the main menu container is too strong, causing readability issues against white background.
3. **Hover state missing or inconsistent** - Buttons should have a smooth hover transition

issues.title: Fix: There were issue in package-lock.json
Add spacing between "Play Game" and "How to Play" buttons
issues.body: Currently, the “Play Game” and “How to Play” buttons are placed too close together, making the UI feel cramped.

issues.title: Redesign quiz game UI with modern look and add interactive features
issues.body: The quiz works, but honestly it looks a bit plain right now. The question box and the answer buttons feel kind of flat and outdated,. 1. Card-style design for the question container with shadow and rounded corners. 2. Larger, colorful answer buttons with hover/active effects. 3. Smooth animations when selecting an answer (e.g., highlight green/red). 4. A progress bar showing how many questions are left. 5. Optional score counter / timer at the top for a “game feel.” 6. Mobile-friendly layout with responsive buttons.

issues.title: Modernize job portal search form design for better aesthetics and usability
issues.body: Right now, the job search form works, but it looks a bit flat and dated. The fields and button could be styled to feel more modern and polished. 1. Add subtle shadows and rounded corners for input fields and the form container. 2. Use consistent padding and spacing so elements feel balanced. 3. Improve the “Search” button — larger, with a gradient or hover effect. 4. Make labels smaller or use placeholders for a cleaner look. 5. Add a soft background color or card-like feel to separate the form from the page background.

issues.title: Footer lacks navigation links and looks incomplete
issues.body:
Right now, our footer just has the copyright text, and that’s it.
It feels kind of empty and doesn’t match the Navbar at the top and it look good if the footer also had quick links to the main sections of the site.
